blocks.text: 2026 F1 season ignites in Melbourne — Leclerc fastest, Aston Martin already limping
🏎️ Australian GP — Leclerc led P1, Aston Martin out of spare Honda batteries · Race Sunday
Hovland sits T44 at even par after two rounds at Bay Hill — well off Berger's scorching -9 lead. The Arnold Palmer crown looks out of reach this week.
🚴 Sat 12:00 — Strade Bianche · Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on Tuscany's iconic white gravel roads
